data.Name: Customized Shoe Rack
data.Title: Customized Shoe Rack
data.Short Description: Handcrafted shoe rack made from reclaimed wood, featuring a mix of open and closed storage.
data.Description:
This handcrafted shoe rack was designed as a practical and aesthetic storage solution for a compact entryway. Built entirely from reclaimed wood, it celebrates the raw beauty and individuality of repurposed materials while supporting sustainable building practices.

Key Features:

  • Material: 100% reclaimed wood, selected for its rich grain and character
  • Design: Asymmetrical layout with a balance of open and closed storage
  • Storage:
    • Three closed compartments to hide bulkier items or shoes
    • Five angled open shelves for easy-access footwear
    • Upper open cubby and top shelf for decorative or everyday essentials
  • Finish: Light sanding and natural oil to preserve texture and tone

The structure’s clean lines and staggered form allow it to fit snugly into a corner space while adding warmth and personality to the room.
